GG0170I2_WLK_10_FEET_GOAL_CD GG0170I2 Mobility: Goal to Walk 10 feet by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal once standing, to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor, or similar space by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
